features_desc: From classification to champion, NOVURAXE manages every phase of the tournament with professional precision.
feat_01_desc: Real-time tournament overview. Leaderboard, latest duels and group stats at a glance.
feat_02_desc: Throw-by-throw scoring. Killshots, round config (1-2) and throws (10-12). Configurable target values.
feat_03_desc: Automatic elimination bracket generation. 2×5 throw duels with KS and Bulls Eye limits.
feat_04_desc: Full stats per player: points, killshots, bulls eye, wins and losses. Detailed profile instantly.
feat_05_desc: Save past tournaments and build a global club ranking across events. All history in one place.
feat_06_desc: Professional reports with your club logo. Leaderboard, bracket, global ranking and full report.
feat_07_desc: Public page without login where anyone can follow the tournament in real time — leaderboard, bracket and results updated instantly from
live_desc_1: Anyone can follow the tournament from their phone
live_feat_1: Live leaderboard with points and throws
live_feat_4: Read only — no login, no editing
live_feat_5: Automatic sync every time the organizer saves
live_badge: Read only · No login · Auto update
step_1_desc: Sign up with your club name, username and email. Full access in seconds.
step_2_desc: Paste the participant list in bulk or add them one by one. PRO and Semi Pro groups separated.
step_3_desc: Tap each throw on screen to assign its value. Killshots and Bulls Eye with one tap.
step_4_desc: One button generates the full bracket from the leaderboard. Duels advance automatically on confirm.
step_5_desc: Download professional PDFs and save the tournament in history to build club stats.
about_p1_3: of axe throwing tournament organizers. Tired of spreadsheets, paper and calculation errors in the middle of an event, we built the tool we wished we had from the start.
about_p2_3: , not just developers. Every feature was designed thinking about what happens on the range: speed to record throws, clarity to see the bracket and professionalism to present results.
about_p3_3: to the next level as an organized sport, with the digital tools it deserves.
val_speed_desc: Score recording in seconds, without interrupting the tournament flow.
val_precision_desc: Zero calculation errors. The system computes everything automatically.
val_security_desc: Each club with isolated data. Professional authentication with Supabase.
val_mobile_desc: Works on any device. Designed to be used on the range.
mission_quote: "Axe throwing deserves the same organizational tools as any professional sport. NOVURAXE is our answer to that."
gear_desc: We are preparing a curated selection of axes, targets, protective equipment and accessories recommended by the community. Every product tested and validated by real throwers.
gear_notify_desc: Be the first to know when it's available.
gear_axes_desc: Competition axe selection for all levels.
gear_targets_desc: Approved wooden targets for training at home or at the club.
gear_protection_desc: Gloves and safety equipment to throw with confidence.
gear_clothing_desc: Technical clothing and axe throwing community merch.
contact_desc: We are here to help with any question about tournaments, accounts or how the platform works.
cta_desc: Free. No install. From any device.
hero_sub:
The ultimate platform to organize axe throwing tournaments.
Real-time leaderboards, automatic brackets and detailed statistics — from any device.
live_desc_full: Anyone can follow the tournament from their phone no account needed. The public page novuraxe.com/live shows in real time:
about_text:
NOVURAXE was born from the real need of axe throwing tournament organizers. Tired of spreadsheets, paper and calculation errors in the middle of an event, we built the tool we wished we had from the start.

We are practitioners of the sport, not just developers. Every feature was designed thinking about what happens on the range: speed to record throws, clarity to see the bracket and professionalism to present results.

Our goal is to take axe throwing to the next level as an organized sport, with the digital tools it deserves.
mission_quote_full: "Axe throwing deserves the same organizational tools as any professional sport. NOVURAXE is our answer to that."
feat_07_desc_pre: Public page without login where anyone can follow the tournament in real time — leaderboard, bracket and results updated instantly from novuraxe.com/live →
